nav.subtitle: Reverse Diagrams
home.title: Factorio Reverse Diagrams
home.description: Interactive explorable explanations of Factorio's simulation — from belt physics to planetary logistics.
belt.title: Belt Mechanics
belt.description: Animated discrete item slot simulator. See how belts move items tick-by-tick, how side-loading works, and how splitters make decisions.
recipe.title: Recipe DAG
recipe.description: Interactive full production dependency graph. Trace any item back to raw ores, adjust production rates, and find critical paths.
pollution.title: Pollution Diffusion
pollution.description: Cellular automaton heatmap simulation. Watch pollution spread from your factory, see absorption by trees, and predict steady-state.
quality.title: Quality Grind
quality.description: Markov chain visualizer for Space Age quality system. Configure modules, calculate expected iterations to reach Legendary.
system.title: System of Systems
system.description: Master feedback loop diagram. See how mining, production, pollution, combat, and research form reinforcing and balancing loops.
widget.comingSoonDesc: This interactive diagram is under development.
